description: Experience the power of unity in the journey of overcoming cancer with our email template. This resource is perfect for non-profit organizations, health and wellness advocates, and fundraising initiatives. Leverage this template to spread awareness about cancer, promote medical advancements, or rally support for a loved one battling the disease. It's more than just medicine, it's about fostering a community of support and wellness. With this template, you can inspire, motivate, and encourage others to join in the fight against cancer. Emphasizing health and wellness, it's an ideal tool for sharing valuable medical information, raising funds, and strengthening the bonds of our collective health journey.
short_description: Join the fight against cancer with our email template, perfect for non-profit organizations, health advocates, and fundraising initiatives. Promote medical advancements, foster wellness, and rally support. Ideal for sharing medical information and raising funds. Strengthen the bonds in our health journey.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
WORLD CANCER DAY

Let's Beat It Together

It is hard to find a person in society today who has not been touched by cancer in some way, either directly or indirectly. World Cancer Day hopes to honor those who are fighting and those who have been lost to this dreadful disease. This unique day of remembrance and determination aims to help people understand more about cancer and inspire them to take action so that hopefully one day there will be many in society who are not touched by cancer.

Learn More

Prevention, early detection and treatment mean there is much cause for hope. There are several ways to get tested, which you can find in our clinic.

 

Image Scannings

Some like MRI, CT scans, and x-rays among many other.

Blood tests

Blood can have indicators show how you're doing

Physical Exams

Sometimes it's as easy as that

Choose your test
 
 
 

Get Your Appointment

Schedule your screening with us! Choose your type of test and time frame.
 

MRI or CT scan

8AM - 12PM

 

Blood Test

11AM - 2PM

 

Mammogram

8AM - 11AM

 
 

MRI or CT scan

12PM - 4PM

 

Physical Exam

8AM - 12PM

 

Mammogram

12PM - 3PM

 
 

Blood Test

7AM - 11AM

 

Physical Exam

1PM - 4PM

 

Mammogram

3PM - 6PM

 
Save Your Slot
 
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
